只因为万恶的世界意志私自挪用了烹饪技能点，郝池就硬是被强行拽了过来。
从少林寺后厨毕业的他，带着个蔫坏系统开始到处宣扬美食。
深夜馋哭千万女网红的香酥肉夹馍。
刚出摊就令家长、学生和老师全体沦陷的极品校园小吃。
用特殊美食，将号称老美疯人院的弗洛里达治的服服帖帖。
郝池从寄人篱下，很快就世界闻名。
可代价呢？
仅迟到了十分钟，郝池就被全网通缉！
千万美女网红深夜哭泣哭，大喊着让郝池对她负责！
仅是因为换了个摆摊地点，食客竟直接报警抓他！
弱小的郝池蹲在角落瑟瑟发抖。
“不是？只想躺平的我，招谁惹谁了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o753bd3e76fb0c9034daa037ec7d931a7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月上九万里","author_id":"","book_id":"7364577981655682110","book_name":"美食拯救，为什么全网都在通缉我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0b0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7364578186769728062","read_count":"42","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150483"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"73","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o753bd3e76fb0c9034daa037ec7d931a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365567&x-signature=maeBR4vs2rqfBsb7qA1F73QNwhg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3096658024073214","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220124671939EBD67116BC2211C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2835,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":530},"user_action":{"author":0,
